problem id: ca72b5b3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHL(3)

examples:
  00101000 -> 01010100
  10010100 -> 11101010
  00010001 -> 10001000
  00101011 -> 11011101
  10101010 -> 01010101
  01101000 -> 01110100
  00011010 -> 11011101
  00100100 -> 00110010

query: 11111011
predicted answer: 11111101
